summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KdM (Klip de Moment) new features: Go Live streaming, Wallet management, and Gift system. Fixed 2 bugs during testing. All 25 backend tests pass. Frontend UI loads correctly with all new features accessible.

fixed_during_testing.issue: send_chat function was defined without decorator - decorator at line 243 had no function body
fixed_during_testing.fix: Moved function body under the decorator

fixed_during_testing.issue: Gift IDs (_id) were excluded from response, preventing gift sending
fixed_during_testing.fix: Modified to include both 'id' and '_id' fields in response

critical_code_review_comments: Viva Payments integration is a TODO placeholder - webhook endpoint exists but not implemented
HLS streaming requires real camera/video chunks - cannot be fully tested in automated environment
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Go Live, Wallet, and Gift features are working. Backend tests cover: live stream start/end/join/leave/like/chat, wallet balance/transactions/topup/withdraw, gifts list/send with 70/30 split verification. Frontend verified: homepage, login, Go LIVE button, Live page, Go Live Studio, Wallet modal with all tabs.

gifts.POST /api/gifts/send: ✓ Deducts sender balance, credits creator 70%, platform 30%, creates notification

frontend.Go LIVE button: ✓ Visible in header when logged in
frontend.LIVE page: ✓ Shows empty state or active streams
frontend.Go Live Studio: ✓ Camera controls, title input, category select, Start LIVE button
frontend.Wallet modal: ✓ Balance display, Top-Up/Withdraw/History tabs all working
